diagrams.title: Depth vs Breadth Spectrum
diagrams.description: A visual spectrum showing the relationship between prototype depth and breadth, illustrating that high depth typically means lower breadth and vice versa
diagrams.purpose: Understand the trade-off between covering many features superficially vs few features thoroughly

diagrams.title: Prototype Fidelity Scale
diagrams.description: A horizontal scale showing progression from low-fidelity to high-fidelity prototypes with example tools and techniques at each level
diagrams.purpose: Choose appropriate fidelity level based on project phase and goals

diagrams.title: When to Use Prototype Types
diagrams.description: Timeline showing project phases and recommended prototype types for each phase
diagrams.purpose: Match prototyping approach to project timeline and objectives

diagrams.title: Horizontal vs Vertical Prototype Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side visual comparison of horizontal (wide view) and vertical (deep view) prototypes
elements: Use case: IA testing vs Complex flow testing
diagrams.purpose: Select appropriate prototype approach based on testing objectives
